first_run.rationale: The score is identical (3/10) in both evaluations. The justification, strengths, and concerns are substantively the same across both versions, focusing consistently on the candidate's lack of required JVM, Kotlin, and enterprise framework experience. The minor differences in phrasing are well within the range of normal run-to-run variation and do not indicate any change in assessment due to the candidate's work locations being changed from Western/European cities to India.
